title: acinos corsicus
intro: Acinos corsicus, also known as Corsican boxwood or Corsican thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acinos corsicus include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress. Acinos corsicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
